description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default image and defines a global before_script that runs `ls -l`, creates a `bin` directory, and adds `/usr/local/go/bin` to PATH, and a global after_script that runs `ls -l`. Add a job named `build_cliotesky` (which runs in the default test stage) that executes `go get google.golang.org/grpc`, `go get github.com/BurntSushi/toml`, and `./buildEverything.sh .`. Configure this job to publish an artifact named `ClioteSky_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}` containing the `bin/` directory and set `untracked: false`.
